prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-GARDENTOOL-RAKE Product Type: SOIL_TILLER_CULTIVATOR Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Wooden Steel Handheld Triple Claw 3 Prong Garden Rake Cultivator Description: The 12" Wooden and Steel Handheld Triple Claw Garden Rake Cultivator Tool is a great addition to your arsenal of gardening tools and gardening accessories. The three-pronged or three-clawed handheld garden rake is an essential tool for:

-Removing unwanted garden debris
-Weeding large sections of soil
-Leveling and grading soil before planting
-Aerating soil so plants can receive the essential nutrients they need to grow
-Working in soil supplements or compost materials to ensure even distribution

Featuring wooden handles, a steel rake head, and a comfortable soft foam grip wrap, this garden rake or cultivator tool is easy to handle, durable, and will last you through many gardening seasons to come. For longevity sake, rinse and dry the garden rake cultivator tool when you are done gardening or weeding and store in a dry place. Search Terms: rake garden tools rakes leaf rake landscaping tools gardening tools hand tools for gardening for women kids weeding heavy duty steel cute planting tools supplies equipment seeds pots augers Features: - GARDEN RAKE CULTIVATOR TOOL: This hand held wooden garden rake or cultivator tool is a gardening essential used to remove garden debris, as well as to level and grade your garden soil before plants or seed are planted in your garden, herb garden, flower pot, plant pot or succulent planter - MULTI PURPOSE TOOL: Garden rakes or cultivators help to aerate soil before sowing seeds, planting young seedlings, plants, flowers or succulents so essential nutrients can penetrate down to the plants roots; it can also be used for working in soil supplements or compost to ensure even distribution - COMFORTABLE HANDLING: The comfortable and ergonomic wooden handle is surrounded by a soft foam wrap grip to give your hand and inner palm protection when gardening or planting - QUALITY MATERIALS: Featuring wooden handles and a steel rake head, this garden rake is durable and will last you through many gardening seasons to come; for longevity, rinse and dry the garden rake cultivator tool when you are done and store in a dry place - SPECIFICATIONS: Country of Origin: China; Materials: wood handle, soft foam grip wrap, metal tool head; Dimensions: 12" Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
